action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the travel environment, including budget, current location, and existing itinerary.

action_set_definitions.name: search_regional_hubs
action_set_definitions.description: Identifies cities within a specific geographic region (e.g., 'Balkans') that act as transit hubs.

region.description: The name of the region to search (e.g., 'Balkans', 'Baltics').

action_set_definitions.name: search_overland_routes
action_set_definitions.description: Searches for overland transport (bus/train) between two cities with specific constraints.

action_set_definitions.name: search_accommodation
action_set_definitions.description: Finds accommodation in a city within a specific radius of a terminal.

action_set_definitions.name: add_to_itinerary
action_set_definitions.description: Commits a transport or accommodation booking to the itinerary and deducts cost from budget.

action_set_definitions.name: verify_geographic_progression
action_set_definitions.description: Checks if a sequence of cities follows a strict South-to-North progression without backtracking.

state_description.destination: The primary city or country for the travel plan.
state_description.travel_dates: The start and end dates of the trip.
state_description.total_budget: Total maximum budget allocated for the trip.
state_description.spent_amount: Total amount spent/committed in the simulation so far.
state_description.itinerary_items: List of booked or planned activities, flights, and accommodations.
state_description.current_geo_location: The traveler's current location within the simulation logic.
